title: CUSTOM ORDER MAID 3D2 It's a Night Magic

notes:
The game starts with a black screen, but after waiting a couple of minutes, the splash screen appears.

Performance is generally good, but animation in conversation and yotogi lag when they change and load times are occasionally quite long.

R18 patch works and installing/downloading DLC from their store works as well.
title: CUSTOM ORDER MAID 3D2 It's a Night Magic
